assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends Extended channel with detailed rationale about 24 months support vs 14 months, calling it ideal for long training campaigns

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends and demonstrates the 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion scope with detailed explanation of what it blocks vs allows, including control plane security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures Sunday 3-9 AM maintenance window with weekly recurrence, explicitly stating it aligns with low-activity periods

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response creates separate node pools: 'h100-training' for GPU training workloads and 'cpu-inference' for inference/monitoring/checkpointing, with different upgrade policies

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response applies maintenance exclusions specifically to the GPU training pool while allowing auto-upgrades on support pools, and provides detailed manual upgrade strategy for between training campaigns

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes checkpointing configuration in the training workload example with 2-hour grace period for checkpoint saves and demonstrates checkpoint saving in emergency upgrade procedures

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response specifies gpu-driver-version=latest in the configuration but does not mention testing or validation in staging environments before production deployment

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response mentions compact placement for RDMA topology preservation but does not discuss GKE version requirements or compatibility verification for GPUDirect/RDMA networking
